body.purpose: All list content, search results, metadata, filter controls. The default register for the entire tool.

label.purpose: Section group headers (uppercase, tracked), field labels, count footers. Always uppercase, always 0.6875rem.

title.purpose: Textarea for memory content only. The deliberate register shift: tool speaks mono, user speaks in prose.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default for background-color and opacity transitions (hover, focus, selection states).

motion.name: ease-press
motion.purpose: Button :active press — 1px downward, no duration, immediate physical metaphor.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action that matters on a screen. Context Green fill, near-black text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; gap: 0.25rem; background-color: oklch(0.55 0.14 165); color: oklch(0.14 0.01 165); border-radius: 0.36rem; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.625; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms, transform 150ms; outline: none; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.55 0.14 165 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.5 0.006 165); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.5 0.006 165 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The invisible-until-needed control. Used for icon actions in list rows, theme toggle, filter toggles.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; padding: 0; background-color: transparent; color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); border-radius: 0.36rem; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms; outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(0.22 0.007 165 / 0.5); color: oklch(0.96 0.006 165); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.5 0.006 165); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.5 0.006 165 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary confirm-style actions. Mark reviewed, Keep editing, Cancel.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.5rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; gap: 0.25rem; background-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.96 0.006 165); border-radius: 0.36rem; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.10); font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.625; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.18); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.5 0.006 165); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.5 0.006 165 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Type Badge — Correction
components.description: Classification chip for correction-type memories. 15% opacity fill in type color.
components.css: .ds-badge-correction { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.27rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; background-color: oklch(0.72 0.16 25 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.72 0.16 25); transition: background-color 150ms; }

components.name: Type Badge — Learning
components.description: Classification chip for learning-type memories. Uses Context Green — the primary accent.
components.css: .ds-badge-learning { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.27rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; background-color: oklch(0.65 0.14 165 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.65 0.14 165); transition: background-color 150ms; }

components.name: Tag Badge (Outline)
components.description: Freeform tag on memory rows. Carries content, not classification. No fill.
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.27rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; background-color: transparent; color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.10); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The visual focal point of the list pane. Leading magnifying glass icon, monospace, minimal fill.
components.css: .ds-input-search-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-input-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 0.625rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); pointer-events: none; } .ds-input-search { display: block; width: 100%; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem 0.125rem 1.75rem; background-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.96 0.006 165); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.12); border-radius: 0.36rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.625; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); } .ds-input-search:focus { border-color: oklch(0.5 0.006 165); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.5 0.006 165 / 0.3); }

components.name: Memory Row
components.description: The signature content surface. Two-row list item: badge + preview text / tags + metadata.
components.html:
• Correction

    Never define subcomponents inside a React parent's render body — each render creates a new function identity, causing remount and lost focus state.

    reacthooksglobal5/14/2026
components.css: .ds-memory-row { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.10); padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background-color: transparent; list-style: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms; } .ds-memory-row:hover { background-color: oklch(0.22 0.007 165 / 0.4); } .ds-memory-row.selected { background-color: oklch(0.22 0.007 165 / 0.6); } .ds-memory-row.focused { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.55 0.14 165 / 0.4); } .ds-memory-row__top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-memory-row__preview { flex: 1; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.625; color: oklch(0.96 0.006 165); display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; text-align: left; } .ds-memory-row__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding-left: 2.625rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-memory-row__scope { margin-left: auto; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); } .ds-memory-row__date { font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); }

components.name: Group Header
components.description: Sticky time-group section divider. Collapse toggle. Uppercase tracked label left, count right.
components.css: .ds-group-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; background-color: oklch(0.13 0.008 165 / 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.10); border: none; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: oklch(0.62 0.008 165); cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-group-header:hover { color: oklch(0.96 0.006 165); }

narrative.overview:
Membank Dashboard is a tool that earned its UI. It lives in the same environment as the terminals and code editors that generate its data — and it looks like it belongs there. Dark-first, monospace-bodied, information-dense without clutter. The design priority is trust: developers need to see their personal AI context clearly, scan it quickly, and modify it confidently. Decoration is a liability.

The system rejects the visual language of consumer SaaS: no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric tiles, no dashboard clichés that signal 'data tool' before the data does. It also explicitly rejects the aesthetic of Datasette — deliberately plain, zero design investment. This is the opposite: Datasette-class function, Raycast-class finish.

Color is a single green-tinted axis (oklch hue 165) with one muted accent and a five-color semantic vocabulary for memory classification. Type-badge colors are classification signals, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Monospace body text throughout — the terminal is the reference frame
Keyboard-first; search box is always /, navigation is ↑↓, delete requires two deliberate presses
Five-color semantic palette encoding memory type classification
Tonal depth only — no box shadows at any surface
Dual-mode with genuine dark-first character; light mode is a real alternative, not a token-swap afterthought

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Context Green appears on at most 10% of any screen. Badge fills use 15% opacity. If you can call a surface 'green' at a glance, the rule has been violated.

rules.name: The Semantic Palette Rule
rules.body: The five type colors are classification signals, never decorative fills. Do not reuse correction orange for generic warnings. Do not reuse preference blue for links. Each color has exactly one meaning.

rules.name: The Mono-First Rule
rules.body: If you reach for Space Grotesk outside of memory content in the textarea, stop. The mono register is the system's identity.

rules.name: The No-Scale Rule
rules.body: There is no display or headline size. Hierarchy is achieved through weight, case, tracking, and color — never through font size alone.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: If you reach for box-shadow (excluding focus rings), the design has broken. Add a tonal background step instead. Shadows do not exist in this vocabulary.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not lift on hover. Background tint changes; geometry does not. The translate-y-px on button :active is the only physical metaphor permitted.

dos: Do use Context Green exclusively for interactive state — active buttons, pin indicators, keyboard focus rings. Its rarity makes it mean something.
Do build depth through opacity tiers (15%, 20%, 40%, 60%) off a single base color rather than reaching for new fills.
Do keep all body and label text in Geist Mono Variable. The mono register is the design's identity.
Do use the two-click delete pattern for every destructive action.
Do reveal list row actions (Pin, Trash) on hover/focus-within via opacity-0 to opacity-100.
Do use 11px uppercase tracking-wide text-muted-foreground for all section labels and field headers.
Do keep the semantic type palette exclusive: correction orange only on corrections, preference blue only on preferences.
Do make Space Grotesk Variable the signal that this is editable memory content. Reserve it for the textarea only.
donts: Don't add box shadows to any surface. This design is tonal-only.
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored stripe accent.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The one legitimate use is backdrop-blur on sticky group headers.
Don't let the design drift toward Datasette: plain, raw, zero design investment.
Don't use Space Grotesk Variable outside of memory content in the textarea.
Don't reuse the five type-badge colors for non-classification purposes.
Don't build card grids. Primary content surfaces are lists and split-pane detail views.
Don't animate layout properties. State transitions may animate opacity, transform, and background-color only.
Don't make the interface feel like a SaaS marketing dashboard: no hero metrics, no identical icon-grid cards.
